commit_scope: Promote task log route GET /api/agent/tasks/{task_id}/log to Form-native BML

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/language-model.fk form-stdlib/tests/source-language-route-class-template-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Local front-door preflight checks and BML route template compilation tests pass successfully. Verification script query correctly matches path templates and falls back gracefully to Python upstream on SQLite database unavailable connection status.

commands: Hostinger Auto Deploy on main after merge
deploy_validation.notes: Deploy check should confirm task log requests are correctly routed by the native kernel front door.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passes; PR CI and deployment verification are pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/agent/tasks/{task_id}/log requests are natively routed by the Form kernel router and executed in BML front door. If log file exists in api/logs/task_{task_id}.log, it streams the file; otherwise, it builds and returns a fallback log snapshot based on Postgres task details.
test_flows: Query the public task log endpoint with Origin header and verify the response structure matches the task log or fallback log schema, marked by X-Form-Router: native-kernel.
